landing.eyebrow: Clear. Verify am. Nobody fit change am.
landing.title: Naija first open, document-first election results platform.
landing.lede: We build am on top Form EC8A. Civil society dey run am. E dey answer to the people.
landing.feature1_body: Results dey show when different party and observer agree. No single point of fraud.
landing.feature2_body: Every number we show, you go see the EC8A wey we take am from.
landing.feature3_body: Every picture we hash am, every event we chain am, and we anchor to blockchain every thirty minutes.
